lessons.title: When Things Break 💥
lessons.description: Understand what Exceptions are and why they crash your program.

lessons.title: Rescue Me 🛟
lessons.description: Catch errors gracefully before they can terminate your code.

lessons.title: The Ensure Block 🛡️
lessons.description: Guarantee that crucial cleanup code runs, crash or no crash.

lessons.title: Raising Exceptions 🧨
lessons.description: Take control and intentionally trigger your own errors.

lessons.title: Custom Error Classes 🏗️
lessons.description: Build dedicated exception types for your app's specific needs.
